creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144714
Patch to json-glib

Attached is a patch to update. The .so numbers seem a bit excessive, but otherwise it looks fine. I'm not sure whether there's a larger update in the works for all the gnome@ stuff.

Fixes:
- libtool:keepla instead of USE_AUTOTOOLS
- pathfix instead of gnomehack
- strip the .so
- Update WWW: link
- fix pkg-plist
- no more .a
